item.title: June Patch Tuesday smashes past 500-CVE mark
Sophos recognized for endpoint leadership in SE Labs Awards 2026
item.description: Independent testing confirms what our customers already know: Sophos Endpoint delivers consistent, real-world protection at every tier of the market, from the largest enterprises to small businesses.

item.title: A needle in a stack of needles: Hunting infostealers with AI
item.description: The sheer number of events and alerts can be overwhelming, but multi-layered pipelines can filter out the noise

item.title: AI in the underground: Curiosity, claims, and concerns
item.description: Amid discussions about how artificial intelligence can facilitate cybercrime, some threat actors remain skeptical

item.title: Introducing Sophos Firewall Config Studio 2.6
item.description: View, edit, compare, analyze, and migrate firewall configurations.

item.title: The Cybersecurity Poverty Line: Why it exists and why Sophos exists to erase it
item.description: Erase is an ambitious word. We chose it because the agentic era of AI creates a genuine opportunity to change the equation.

item.title: A double-edged bleeding edge: Classifying AI threats
item.description: Sophos X-Ops presents a working taxonomy for attacks using, and targeting, AI

item.title: Vect and TeamPCP partner for ransomware campaigns
item.description: Credentials harvested through supply chain compromises enable large‑scale ransomware deployment

item.title: "Exploit mitigation" stalled around 2008. The attacks didn't.
item.description: AI turns a patched bug into a working exploit in hours. Why endpoint exploit mitigation stalled in 2008, and what a default-on mitigation layer looks like now.
